content.en:
Moment.

The Frontier Lord and the Star Lord have arrived at the ruins of the Star Tower.

After coming here, the border lord looked through the past time and space, peeking into the past.

Soon, he locked on the location of Ye Tian's replica body, and then spied on the place where Ye Tian arrived.

Even if there is a shield from the Legendary Realm Lord, it can't stop the prying eyes of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

But he continued to snoop, but he could only find that Ye Tian came from the True Saintless Land.

After a long time.

The border lord said: "The one who killed the Shattered Star Lord is indeed a legendary lord of the transcendent realm, and he is from the True No Holy Land, as for which one is the True No Holy Land, it needs to be investigated, and several targets of the True No Holy Land are locked, I will take a sip or two, maybe I can guess it." "

Immediately, the border lord came to a territory in the True Void Holy Land, and quietly spied on the past of a transcendent realm legendary lord, and then, he spied on other transcendent realm legendary lords in the True Void Holy Land.

Finally, the Frontier Lord learns that a powerful Transcendent Legendary Lord has been born in the True Void Holy Land, the Endless Lord.

Afterwards.

The Frontier Lord spies into the past plane, trying to uncover the Endless Lord's past.

He was directly in 08, somewhere in the Infinite Sea, the area where the Endless Lord had been, and he was here to spy on time and space, but when he spied on Ye Tian.

The time of shock happened, he couldn't spy on Ye Tian's past, there was no peak Legendary Realm Lord in the True Saint Land, so it was impossible to do this.

Moreover, this feeling of not being able to snoop on was exactly the same as when he spied on that mysterious transcendent realm lord before, and he couldn't snoop on.

Now, the border lord can be sure

Ye Tian was the Transcendent Realm Lord who killed the Shattered Star Lord, there was no doubt about it.

But he didn't continue to investigate Ye Tian, because it was unnecessary, and he felt that Ye Tian was not simple, and he couldn't spy on the past, even if the other peak Legendary Realm lords helped him shield the past time and space, they couldn't not spy on it at all.

Such a Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, he actually didn't want to offend, what if the other party had a relationship with the Eternal Master?

So, he said truthfully: "Lord of the Strange Star, I can almost lock the identity of that Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm, but he seems to be very simple, I can't spy on his past, maybe it has something to do with some powerful existence. I advise you not to be his enemy, otherwise it is easy to get into trouble. If you don't want to know, you should not have happened today, but if you want to know, you must not mention this day in the future, and you must not come to me again, or I will kill you. "

The border lord spoke very seriously, without the slightest hint of joking.

The lord of the present was silent for a moment, and then made up his mind: "Border lord, I want to know. "

The Frontier Lord sighed and said, "Endless Lord!"

With that, the Frontier Lord disappeared.

"Endless Lord!"

The Star Lord muttered to himself, noting down the name.

Subsequently, he went to investigate this Endless Lord, and the truly famous achievement was to go to the ruins of the Yang Lie Lord, at that time it was still the realm of the Legendary Lord of the Half-Step Transcendence Realm, and it was said that he might have taken the inner area treasure of the Yang Lie Lord.

"Endless Lord, if he really controls time, it's too ......"

The Star Lord felt that it was too amazing, and he couldn't believe it.

But the results of the border lord's investigation should be true, and it is unlikely to be wrong.

Subsequently, he investigates the growth trajectory of the Endless Lord.

One word, quick!

His strength has improved very quickly, and he is quite low-key, but in the True Saintless Land, everyone knows that he is very powerful, but how powerful he really is, it is not very clear, and he has a good relationship with the Legendary Realm Lord Frostless Lord.

"It should be him, although I don't want to believe it, but his cultivation is improving too fast. Moreover, he is now at the peak of the Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord realm, once he breaks through to the half-step Legendary Realm Lord realm, he can even directly impact the Legendary Realm Lord level. "

The Star Lord muttered.

He never wanted to offend such a demon before, but now he is his enemy.

"Kill, you must kill him before he breaks through to the realm of the Legendary Realm Lord. "

The Star Lord thought.

But it is not easy to kill the Endless Lord Ye Tian, the other party's body must be hidden in the True Void Holy Land, and there is no point in killing one or two clones.

Unless he really entered the True Saintless Land, he would not be able to contact Ye Tian's body.

"First build the Void River Boundary Array, my real body is hiding in the Void River Boundary Array, and then the clone will attack and kill the Endless Lord, I don't want to fight for my life, I want to kill him, no matter how powerful he is, it is just a Legendary Lord of the Transcendent Realm, I can kill him in an instant, it's just a big deal to lose a clone." "

The Star Lord thought.

Moreover, the main body is hiding, and the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Sacred Land don't want to find him, and they can't lock the location of his main body through the contact of the clone.

So, this is the most perfect plan.

After that, the Star Lord began to build the Void River Boundary Array somewhere in the Void Region.

After a period of time, the construction of the Void River Boundary Array was completed.

Immediately, the main body of the Star Lord stayed in the Void River Boundary Array, and a clone came to a distant place outside the True Void Holy Land.

Immediately, he stepped into the 153 time river to find Ye Tian's location.

"Huh, can't find it?"

The Star Lord was stunned.

Ye Tian should be in the True Saintless Land, why can't he find it?

Soon, he thought of a possibility.

"The Void River Boundary Array, the True Void Realm is too strict with the protection of the Endless Lord, and he actually hid his body in the Void River Barrier Array, this is for fear that the Legendary Realm Lord will assassinate the demons and hopes of their Truly Void Realm. "

The Star Lord cursed secretly.

Hidden within the Void River Boundary Array, he couldn't lock Ye Tian's location, how could he attack and kill?

"I'll just keep waiting, I don't believe that your body will stay in the Void River Boundary Array for the rest of your life. "

The Star Lord thought to himself.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian had been in retreat and penance here at the Three Thousand Kirins, and his strength improved rapidly.

He didn't know that the Star Lord was staring at him.

In fact, every copy of his body is the essence, even if he is killed, it doesn't matter.

Before you know it, the long years have passed.

After sixty million eternal years, Ye Tian finally came to the most critical moment.

His body was about to completely merge with the Heaven and Earth of Will Rules, that is to say, he was about to break through to the half-step Legendary Realm Lord realm. _
